title: poa scabrivaginata
intro: Poa scabrivaginata, also known as rough hairy meadow-grass, is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Poa scabrivaginata include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Poa scabrivaginata can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
